justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted "after-tomorrow at 10h" as June 3rd at 10:00, when the conversation started on June 6th, 2026, making "after-tomorrow" June 8th, 2026.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered some alternatives but did not always expand the search intelligently, leading to the user having to suggest new dates and times multiple times.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent required multiple turns to find an available slot, partly due to the initial temporal misunderstanding and partly due to not offering a wider range of options upfront.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer expressed frustration with the difficulty in finding an appointment, indicating a less than smooth experience due to the agent's initial misunderstanding and subsequent limited suggestions.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered by checking new dates and times as suggested by the user, but it did not proactively offer a broader range of available slots after the initial rejections.
